metadata.title: Trust Vault — Secure Data Storage and Transfer
metadata.description: Create reliable encrypted containers, distribute access with ease, and securely transfer data without risk. Open-source solution with modern encryption algorithms.
metadata.keywords: secure storage, encrypted file sharing, AES-256, zero-knowledge, privacy, cybersecurity, data protection, information security, open source security, secure collaboration, Shamir's Secret Sharing, passwordless access, secure cloud, data encryption, end-to-end encryption

main.title: Store and transmit data with confidence
main.text: Create reliable encrypted containers, distribute access with ease, and securely transfer data without risk.

download.title: Download
download.text: Download and try the fully free single version

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.text: Discover the future potential of the product

about.title: About the product
about.text: Trust Vault is your personal data safe, designed with security, privacy, and convenience in mind. We’ve combined cutting-edge encryption technologies with a flexible approach to access management, so you can store and share data without fear of leaks.

for.title: Who We Built This For?
for.3: Families who want to share important documents
for.4: Anyone tired of trusting their data to cloud giants

text.1: Your personal vault, right on your computer.
text.2: The single version is a completely standalone app for secure local storage. No sign-ups, no servers, no internet required — total control is yours.

plans.title: Plans
plans.text: Our journey is clear and deliberate: starting with a simple, secure local vault, and evolving into a comprehensive platform for sharing, team collaboration, and enterprise-grade integrations.

1.title: Сore + CLI
1.text: Functions for encryption, container generation, and management. Local operation without a GUI, offering maximum transparency. Perfect for DevOps, automation, and CI/CD workflows.

2.title: Single (Beta)
2.text: No sign-ups, no internet required, and complete control stays with you. User-friendly graphical interface built on the core.

3.title: Cloud
3.text: Sync your containers via an encrypted cloud. Access them on multiple devices with zero security compromises.

4.title: Enterprise
4.text: Multi-user access, permissions, auditing, and integrations — all the essentials for enterprise-scale deployment.

hero.subtitle: Your personal data safe designed with security, privacy, and convenience in mind
hero.description: Store and transmit data with confidence using reliable encrypted containers. Securely transfer data without risk — total control is yours.

capabilities.title: Core Capabilities
capabilities.text: Built with security, privacy, and convenience as our foundation

1.title: Open Source
1.text: Our project is open source, allowing for community scrutiny and validation to ensure transparency and trust.

2.title: Multi-access Control
2.text: Shamir's Secret Sharing provides advanced multi-access control, ensuring your data remains secure even with distributed access.

3.title: Strong Encryption
3.text: AES-256 encryption provides military-grade security for all your sensitive data, both at rest and in transit.

4.title: Privacy-First
4.text: No sign-ups, no servers, no internet required for the Personal version. Your data never leaves your control.

5.title: Local Storage
5.text: Data is stored locally on your device, giving you complete control and eliminating third-party risks.

6.title: Easy to Use
6.text: Despite advanced security features, Trust Vault is designed for convenience and ease of use.

bottom.title: Military-Grade Security
bottom.text: Trust Vault combines industry-leading encryption standards with innovative access control mechanisms to provide unparalleled security for your most sensitive data.

overview.title: Overview
overview.text: Explore the interface and features of Trust Vault through screenshots and video demos. See how the most secure data storage solution works.

whoIs.title: Who is Trust Vault For?
whoIs.text: See how Trust Vault protects and organizes your most valuable digital assets across different industries and use cases with cutting-edge security technology.

1.title: Business & Enterprise
1.text: Secure corporate data management and compliance solutions for organizations of all sizes.

2.title: Individual Users
2.text: Personal data protection and privacy solutions for individuals and families.

3.title: Developers & IT
3.text: Advanced tools and APIs for developers building secure applications and systems.

4.title: Journalists & Media
4.text: Secure communication and source protection for media professionals and journalists.

5.title: Healthcare Professionals
5.text: HIPAA-compliant solutions for medical records and patient data protection.

6.title: Legal Professionals
6.text: Attorney-client privilege protection and secure legal document management.

versions.title: Choose Your Version
versions.text: From local-first security to enterprise-grade solutions
versions.bottomText: All versions include our core security features: AES-256 encryption and Shamir's Secret Sharing.

download.title: Download Trust Vault
download.text: Get started with the Personal version — available now for all major platforms

security.title: Security Notice!
security.text: Always download Trust Vault from official sources. Verify the digital signature after download to ensure authenticity. Our releases are signed and can be verified through our public key available on our GitHub repository.

download.openSource: Trust Vault is open source. View the code, report issues, or contribute on GitHub.

1.question: What is Trust Vault?
1.answer: Trust Vault is a secure data storage and transfer solution that allows you to store and transfer data securely.
